Class ProductService

java.lang.Object
com.example.milestone.services.ProductService
@Service public class ProductService extends Object
Provides business logic for product-related operations. This service returns, creates, updates, and deletes products for a user.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductService(ProductRepository productRepository)
    Creates a ProductService with the product repository.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Product
    addProduct(Product product)
    Saves a new product to the database.
    boolean
    deleteProduct(UUID id, UUID userId)
    Deletes a specific product.
    List<Product>
    getAllProducts(UUID userId)
    Returns all the products owned by a specific user.
    Product
    getProductById(UUID id, UUID userId)
    Returns a product matching a specific id.
    boolean
    updateProduct(UUID id, UUID userId, Product updated)
    Updates an existing product via product id.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductService

      public ProductService(ProductRepository productRepository)
      Creates a ProductService with the product repository.
      Parameters:
      productRepository - the repository to hold product data

  • Method Details

    • getAllProducts

      public List<Product> getAllProducts(UUID userId)
      Returns all the products owned by a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - the id of the user who owns the products.
      Returns:
      a list of products

    • getProductById

      public Product getProductById(UUID id, UUID userId)
      Returns a product matching a specific id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the product
      userId - the id of the user who owns the product
      Returns:
      product if found, null if not

    • addProduct

      public Product addProduct(Product product)
      Saves a new product to the database.
      Parameters:
      product - the product to add
      Returns:
      the saved product

    • updateProduct

      public boolean updateProduct(UUID id, UUID userId, Product updated)
      Updates an existing product via product id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the product to update
      userId - the id of the user who owns the product
      updated - the new updated product
      Returns:
      true if product is updated, otherwise fail

    • deleteProduct

      public boolean deleteProduct(UUID id, UUID userId)
      Deletes a specific product.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the product to be deleted
      userId - the id of the user who owns the product
      Returns:
      true if product is deleted, otherwise false
